case_title: JUAN FRANCISCO MORA VS. PRO QUALITY BUILDERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORA, JUAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PRO QUALITY BUILDERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORA, JUAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRO QUALITY BUILDERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $9,139.12 PRINCIPAL, $94.09 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,458.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
